title: Chapter 28
content:
Chapter 28: Chapter 28: At This Point... It Wasn’t A Massage Anymore, Right?

She really said it!

" My, my...I don’t think I can help Mom. Did you know that pressing the same part is bad~, so it’s necessary to balance everything mom~"

Owen is not talking about the tits...he just wanted to slip his hand to her fruit!

He can press, fondle, grope and suck those milkers for a whole year and he won’t complain.

"I-is that so? I don’t know if that kind of thing exists..."

That man...is hardworking, and Owen is moving to that sage godly path.

A son, teacher, farmer and massager...and more to come!

"H-hmmnn... but don’t look at it, okay?.. Just touch it, but don’t look. I will get genuinely angry if you don’t promise me that." She was incredibly bashful, but being shy wasn’t going to save her now!

’Ohh...I think I’m really moving to the path of being a villain now."

Ding!

[Because you really ARE!]

Owen simply swatted away the basher and hater of his life as Owen believes in the Dharma.

Inner peace, the tranquility to the path of being a perfect MILF tamer..

[ This shit is hopeless....]

’Inner peace...don’t let the sound of demons get into your ears.’

Owen opened his eyes...as he regained his thoughts.

The demon is finally swatted away

Never in his wildest dreams did he think he would touch the forbidden fruit on day one.

Although he couldn’t plug her core with his shaft just yet, not tonight... but definitely the next day.

He needed to keep his word, too. He wouldn’t look at it; he was a man of his word.

Even though he acted like a villain in a novel, he still maintained his own set of thoughts.

Hell, he didn’t even know she was whimpering non-stop, since Arielle had excused it by claiming she was stretching her body to its absolute limit.
